citations: From - sam@examplecom Subject - Follow up Great seeing you Yes, I joined Point72 last month Please send the AI infra article
payload.decision: Store one durable memory: the sender said they joined Point72 last month. Treat the article request as a transient action item, not a durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The sender is identified as Sam by the email source, but there is not enough information to resolve a stable existing entity with high confidence.

payload.intent: Follow-up after meeting; share a requested AI infrastructure article.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said they joined Point72 last month.
Sam asked to be sent the AI infra article.

details: Extracted a durable fact about employment change.
Captured a transient request for an article.

repair_options: If desired, I can merge this Sam with an existing contact once a clearer identity match is available.
